evals.prompt: Add a FullCalendar monthly view to my Django project. Events should be loaded from /api/events/ as JSON. I need Polish locale.
evals.expected_output: CDN script tag setup with FullCalendar and locale set to 'pl', Calendar constructor with dayGridMonth view and events JSON feed URL.
expectations: Uses FullCalendar v6 CDN bundle (not npm/yarn install)
Sets initialView to dayGridMonth
Sets locale to 'pl' for Polish
Uses JSON feed from /api/events/ (events property set to URL string or object with url)
Calls calendar.render() after construction
Includes firstDay: 1 (Monday start, standard for Polish locale)
Uses htmx.ajax() as the bridge pattern (not hx-* attributes on calendar elements) if HTMX integration is shown
Does not require separate interaction plugin import for basic calendar display

evals.prompt: I have a FullCalendar on my page and I want clicking on an event to open an HTMX modal with event details fetched from the server.
evals.expected_output: eventClick callback using htmx.ajax() to fetch a server-rendered partial into a modal container.
expectations: Uses eventClick callback (not dateClick or select)
Calls info.jsEvent.preventDefault() in eventClick to prevent default URL navigation
Uses htmx.ajax() to fetch event details from the server
Targets a modal container element for the HTMX swap
Does NOT mention interaction plugin as a requirement for eventClick
Shows the modal only after HTMX content is loaded (not before, to avoid empty flash)
Uses TemplateResponse or server-rendered partial (not JsonResponse) for the modal content

evals.prompt: I need drag-and-drop on my calendar so users can reschedule events. When they drop, it should PATCH the backend API and revert if the request fails.
evals.expected_output: editable: true, eventDrop callback with fetch PATCH and info.revert() on failure.
expectations: Sets editable: true on the calendar
Implements eventDrop callback
Also implements eventResize callback (drag changes position, resize changes duration)
Uses fetch() with method PATCH (not HTMX - drag-drop persistence is a JSON API call)
Calls info.revert() in the catch/error handler to undo the visual change on failure
Sends start and end in the PATCH payload
Includes CSRF token in the PATCH request (X-CSRFToken header)
Checks response.ok or response status before considering success
